generated_oml:
instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing crane position, velocity, and state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane operational state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication, TimescaleDB
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based application for streaming crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of motion planning"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation mechanisms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control system for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization using context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of motion planning in the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionPlanningAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical operational metrics of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of model fidelity"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelFidelityInsight
]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control of digital twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance MotionPlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action for optimal motion planning of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into historical operational metrics"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from real-time visualization of crane operations"
]

instance ModelFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into model fidelity for validation"
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into version control status of digital twin models"
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory environment for lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, CraneController
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane component in the lab-scale system"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for the physical gantry crane"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application (Python) transmits control commands via the Physical Crane Interface to the Physical Crane, with operator inputs processed through the Human Machine Interface (HMI)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system's architecture is visualized using the C4 Model with context and container diagrams, as applied to the lab scale gantry crane system described in the documents."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services within the digital twin communicate via an MQTT Broker for signaling, and TimescaleDB serves as the central data storage."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin pipeline implementation and utilization of the AutomationML standard for interoperability in indoor air quality management applications."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar complies with AutomationML standards for digital twin modeling. Other exemplars use ad-hoc approaches without specified compliance to industry standards or interoperability frameworks."
]
